items.title: Croatia's Incredible Run Joins Top World Cup Moments List
items.summary: The World Cup is defined by memorable moments. Counting down to the top 100 of all-time.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: GT's middle order 'exposed', but the problem might be higher up
items.summary: "We shouldn't be allowing Rahul Tewatia or Shahrukh Khan [to face] lots of balls," Matthew Hayden, Gujarat Titans' batting coach, says after the collapse against Mumbai Indians
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Furry, feathered and winged: Creatures run loose in stadiums
items.summary: A goose patrolled Wrigley Field during the third inning of Phillies-Cubs. It's not the first time a creature stole the show at a sporting event.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
